chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ بَدَأَ بِالْمَرْوَةِ قَبْلَ الصَّفَا أَوْ سَهَا فِي السَّعْيِ بَيْنَهُمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 143 – The one who begins with Al-Marwa before Al-Safa, or makes a mistake in the Sa’ee between the two

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/74)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/74)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ بَدَأَ بِالْمَرْوَةِ قَبْلَ الصَّفَا قَالَ يُعِيدُ أَ لَا تَرَى أَنَّهُ لَوْ بَدَأَ بِشِمَالِهِ قَبْلَ يَمِينِهِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ أَرَادَ أَنْ يُعِيدَ الْوُضُوءَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who began with Al-Marwa before Al-Safa. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should repeat. Do you not see that had he began with his left before his right during the ablution, he would repeat the ablution?’
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad Ali ibn al-Hakam from Ali ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who begins from al-Marwah before al- Safa’. He (the Imam) said, ‘He must do it again. Consider if one begins washing his left arms before the right arm for wudu’, he is required to take wudu’ again.’”
